notes: Dashboard fixes: EMI activity, debt tracker visibility, trajectory removal. Additive/Dashboard-scoped; no engine or other-page changes. (1) MONTHLY OUTFLOW / SURPLUS: completed EMIs were still being summed into this month's outflow (understating surplus). Outflow now counts only EMIs ACTIVE this month via a new shared helper _emiActiveIn(emi, ym): started on/before the month AND not strictly past the EMI's end month (the final payment month still counts as active). (2) DEBT PAYOFF TRACKER: fixed EMIs whose final payment falls in the current month being wrongly dropped. Previously the tracker treated remaining===0 as 'done' and hid them; an EMI whose last installment is the current month has remaining 0 but is still active, so short EMIs ending this month (e.g. flight, walking-pad) vanished, leaving only long loans like the education loan visible. 'Done' is now strictly nowYM > endIso, so those EMIs remain visible until genuinely past. Completed EMIs still drop off; not-yet-started EMIs still show 'starts in N mo'; the section hides only when no active/future EMI remains. (3) LIQUIDITY: months-of-expenses denominator now also uses only active EMIs via the same shared helper, so outflow, liquidity, and the debt tracker are mutually consistent. (4) NET-WORTH TRAJECTORY CHART: removed from the Dashboard per user preference (section markup + render call removed; helper retained as inert). KNOWN ITEM (still deferred, unchanged): current-month savings forecast uses the engine's PLANNED surplus, so logging a large current-month expense does not yet re-forecast future savings; that change touches projectSavingsChain and needs dedicated double-count verification.
